response.step_by_step_log: I observed the video and identified it as a VTuber performance featuring Kobo Kanaeru. The on-screen text at 01:05 clearly displayed the song title 'ステキな日曜日 - Gyu Gyu グッデイ!' and credits, identifying Shingo Asari as the music/lyrics contributor. A web search for '"ステキな日曜日" Mana Ashida Japanese and English lyrics' confirmed the original song is by Mana Ashida. I split the video into two scenes: an initial intro/dialogue scene and a main song performance scene, and extracted the original Japanese lyrics to create the English translation.
response.global_summary: A VTuber performance video featuring Kobo Kanaeru. The video begins with brief dialogue and banter, transitioning into a full dance performance of the song 'Suteki na Nichiyoubi - Gyu Gyu Good Day!' by Kobo Kanaeru.

scenes.description: Dialogue and banter between characters while music plays faintly in the background.
Kobo Kanaeru performs a song and dance routine. The title and credits appear on-screen.
scenes.song_title: ステキな日曜日 - Gyu Gyu グッデイ!
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ギュッ!ギュッ! ギュッギュッギュッ!
ギュッ!ギュッ! ギュッギュッギュッ!
ギュッ!ギュッ! ギュッギュッギュッ!
ギュッギュッギュッのギュッ!
サンサンとおひさま笑顔 日曜日
おでかけしましょ
はぐれないように
しっかり 仲良くね 手をつないで
ずっとずっとずっと一緒にいようね
明日も明後日もハッピーグッデイ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Gyu! Gyu! Gyu Gyu Gyu!
Gyu! Gyu! Gyu Gyu Gyu!
Gyu! Gyu! Gyu Gyu Gyu!
Let's get all the Gyu's together!
Sunny, sunny, sun, Sunday
Let's go out with a smile
Let's be careful not to get separated
Let's get along well
Hand in hand
Let's be together forever and ever
Even tomorrow, and the day after, let's have a great day!
